title: Evangelion Photograph Translations
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Photograph Translations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 23, 2010 10:14 pm http://www.evamonkey.com/eva-photograph-translations.zip This collection of translations by Bochan Bird was done back in 2003. You may know him for his translation efforts for the Evangelion ML and Eva Otaku. These four books were published in 1996, and contain imagery relevant to the four characters (Asuka, Kaworu, Rei, Shinji) as well as quotations and various other thoughts and musings. In the case of the Asuka and Rei books, Yuko Miyamura and Megumi Hayashibara wrote text for their characters. It's mostly internal thoughts that read like poetry. The Shinji and Kaworu books were authored entirely by Gainax and consist of quotation from the series. Enjoy.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Oct 23, 2010 11:05 pm Evidently Yuko Miyamura is well known for her love of monkeys and military items.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Oct 23, 2010 11:42 pm The other three were fairly unremarkable, but Asuka's...uh, Jesus. Yuko Miyamura may not be dethroning Yuu Kobayashi as craziest female seiyuu any time soon but god damn is she trying.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Sun Oct 24, 2010 1:07 am Azathoth wrote: Yuko Miyamura may not be dethroning Yuu Kobayashi as craziest female seiyuu any time soon but god damn is she trying.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Oct 24, 2010 3:52 am Thank you for sharing Evamonkey. Megumi Hayashibara wrote: I believe in myself, believing in you.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Oct 24, 2010 4:17 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Thank you for sharing Evamonkey. I wonder if this phrase could be updated to a post-Gurren Lagann standard.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Oct 24, 2010 4:32 am Azathoth wrote: Hot damn, I didn't even notice that! First Imaishi stole "But it's not zero, right? Then that's as good as a hundred percent!" and now this. lolgainax

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 25, 2010 7:46 pm Awesome, thanks Monkey! Heh, the Shinji and Kaworu translations seem underwhelming since it's just series quotes compared to the Asuka and Rei translations.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 25, 2010 8:53 pm Azathoth wrote: Hot damn, I didn't even notice that! First Imaishi stole "But it's not zero, right? Then that's as good as a hundred percent!" and now this.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Oct 25, 2010 8:58 pm NAveryW wrote: Are you implying anything in TTGL was original?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 25, 2010 9:05 pm TOPIC.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 25, 2010 9:07 pm Not yet. Too early.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 25, 2010 9:15 pm NAveryW wrote: Not yet. Too early.
